'''Jerius''' was the [[King/Legends|king]] of the [[Kentra]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was wise and a devout follower of prophet [[Michael Tandre|Tandre's]] teachings. He was very cautious and thoughtful and had great visions for his people and was mildly annoyed at the ambitious [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Grumman Mogotah]]. He was a [[Master of the Sword]].<ref name="TP" />
